source_of_truth: nvidia-smi process and GPU memory readback while target/debug/synapse-mcp --mode stdio was running

no_model_loaded.readback: nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid,process_name,used_memory returned no rows; nvidia-smi pmon -c 1 returned no active GPU process rows

yolov10n_loaded.reason: The M1 local build does not bundle YOLOv10n and no operator-imported yolov10n_general.onnx exists on either checked source-of-truth path.
